---
name: Framework or playbook addition
about: New methodology to encode into reference/
title: "[framework] "
labels: "framework, reference"
assignees: ''
---

## Framework or playbook category

The methodology family being encoded (e.g. *"long-form ghostwriting playbook,"* *"hybrid-full-stack growth arc,"* *"comment-for-magnet sequence design"*).

## Target location

- [ ] `reference/frameworks/dm/{name}.md` — DM-ops methodology
- [ ] `reference/frameworks/content/{name}.md` — content / virality methodology
- [ ] `reference/frameworks/offer/{name}.md` — offer architecture methodology
- [ ] `reference/frameworks/fulfillment/{name}.md` — fulfillment methodology
- [ ] `reference/operators/external/{slug}.md` — anonymized external operator archetype
- [ ] `reference/playbooks/{name}.md` — multi-phase agency playbook
- [ ] `reference/swipe-file/posts-linkedin/{pillar}/{slug}.md` — annotated real high-performer post
- [ ] `reference/templates/{name}.md` — output template
- [ ] `reference/platforms/{name}.md` — platform-specific playbook
- [ ] `reference/verticals/{name}.md` — vertical adaptation pack

## Source surface (anonymized)

Where the methodology is publicly documented. Use methodology descriptors, not operator or company names:

- Public training / curriculum: (descriptor only)
- Public LinkedIn content history: (descriptor only — e.g. *"24-month posting history of an info-product operator"*)
- Public podcast / video: (descriptor only)
- Public book / publication: (descriptor only)
- Other:

## Why this addition

Which skills will reference this framework once encoded? Which profiles does it inform?

## Verification plan

How the encoded content will be verified against the source. Reference page IDs, chapter references, video timestamps — without revealing the source operator's identity in the reference file itself.

## Anonymization check

- [ ] Confirmed: the file uses methodology descriptors only — no real operator, agency, or client names anywhere in the body, examples, or attribution footer.

## Additional context

Anything relevant — methodology lineage, related frameworks already in the workspace, known gaps in the source material.
